libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: For native test execution of io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1, configure runtime system properties/args: -Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow and -Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true. Meaningful tests can use Vertx.vertx(), WebClient/WebClientSession/CachingWebClient, BodyCodec, local 127.0.0.1 HttpServer endpoints, JSON/forms/multipart/streaming, redirects, cookies, and cache headers; no external service is required.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: The existing 5.0.0 test scaffold applies these native runtime args only when libraryVersion == '5.0.0', so running the 5.0.1 candidate through that scaffold can omit them.
io.vertx:vertx-auth-oauth2:5.0.1 is an optional artifact only needed if tests intentionally exercise OAuth2WebClient; it is not required for core WebClient coverage.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: Vert.x Web Client 5.0.1 remains a local HTTP client/server test target with no Docker service or extra mandatory dependency, but its Netty 4.2.2.Final runtime needs the same Java 24+/25 unsafe-access native runtime properties already used for 5.0.0.
